message.content:
Run ALL of the following bash commands in the project directory C:\Users\User\citedby-ai and report EVERY result. This is a read-only audit. Do NOT modify any files.

**2.1 — Arborescence:**
```bash
cd /c/Users/User/citedby-ai
find . -maxdepth 3 -not -path "*/node_modules/*" -not -path "*/.git/*" -not -path "*/dist/*" -not -path "*/.claude/*" | sort | head -150
```

```bash
cd /c/Users/User/citedby-ai
echo "=== Fichiers par extension ==="
find . -not -path "*/node_modules/*" -not -path "*/.git/*" -type f | sed 's/.*\.//' | sort | uniq -c | sort -rn | head -15
```

```bash
cd /c/Users/User/citedby-ai
echo "=== Fichiers par dossier ==="
for dir in services pages components config lib types hooks utils; do
  count=$(find . -path "./$dir/*" -name "*.ts" -o -path "./$dir/*" -name "*.tsx" 2>/dev/null | wc -l)
  echo "$dir/: $count fichiers"
done
```

**2.2 — Orphaned files & residues:**
```bash
cd /c/Users/User/citedby-ai
echo "=== Fichiers orphelins ==="
for f in $(find pages/ components/ -name "*.tsx" 2>/dev/null); do
  basename=$(basename "$f" .tsx)
  imports=$(grep -rn "$basename" --include="*.ts" --include="*.tsx" --exclude-dir=node_modules . | grep -v "$f" | wc -l)
  if [ "$imports" -eq 0 ]; then
    echo "ORPHELIN (0 imports) : $f"
  fi
done
```

```bash
cd /c/Users/User/citedby-ai
echo "=== Residus Next.js ==="
find . -name "layout.tsx" -o -name "page.tsx" -o -name "next.config.*" -not -path "*/node_modules/*" 2>/dev/null
```

```bash
cd /c/Users/User/citedby-ai
echo "=== Fichiers de backup ==="
find . -name "*.backup" -o -name "*.bak" -o -name "*.old" -o -name "*_backup*" -not -path "*/node_modules/*" 2>/dev/null
```

```bash
cd /c/Users/User/citedby-ai
echo "=== Fichiers config inutiles ==="
ls -la .mcp.json .remote-tunnel-state.json .claude-context.md 2>/dev/null || echo "Aucun"
```

**2.3 — Circular imports:**
```bash
cd /c/Users/User/citedby-ai
echo "=== Imports circulaires ==="
for f in $(find services/ -name "*.ts" 2>/dev/null); do
  imports=$(grep "from './" "$f" 2>/dev/null | sed "s/.*from '.\///" | sed "s/'.*//")
  for imp in $imports; do
    target="services/$imp"
    if [ -f "$target.ts" ]; then
      base=$(basename "$f" .ts)
      if grep -q "$base" "$target.ts" 2>/dev/null; then
        echo "CIRCULAIRE : $f <-> $target.ts"
      fi
    fi
  done
done
```

Report ALL results verbatim. Group by section (2.1, 2.2, 2.3).
